userAccount.title: User Account
userAccount.description: Private details of a user including billing structure and active subscription tier.

uid.description: The unique user ID matching their Firebase Authentication ID.

email.description: Private user email address associated with the account.

subscribed.description: Indicates if the user has an active, paid billing subscription.

billingCycle.description: Billing cycle, monthly or yearly billing.

nextPaymentDate.description: The next scheduled recurring billing charge date.

cardLast4.description: The last four digits of the user's payment card stored in the vault.

cardBrand.description: The card brand name, e.g., Visa, Mastercard.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was first created.

viewerProfile.title: Viewer Profile
viewerProfile.description: A customized movie viewer sub-profile under a user account, like Netflix's viewer profiles.

name.description: Display name of the viewer profile, e.g., Dad, Kids.

avatar.description: Hex color code or URL representing the viewer's custom avatar.

isKids.description: Flag enabling standard parental guidance filters and restricted titles.

watchlist.description: List of movie ID strings bookmarked to the user's watchlist.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this profile was added.

/users/{userId}.description: Root private user settings and billing structure. Accessed only by owners.

/users/{userId}/profiles/{profileId}.description: Viewer subprograms configured for custom watchlist and streaming preferences.
